a: Digital FTEs are AI Employees designed to automate repetitive business processes. I build AI customer support employees, AI sales assistants, AI CRM agents, and multi-agent systems that work like full-time digital team members — 24/7, without breaks.

Agentic AI means AI systems that can reason, make decisions, use tools, and collaborate with other agents autonomously. Unlike traditional chatbots that only respond to questions, Agentic AI performs tasks and workflows without human step-by-step guidance.

RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) combines large language models with external knowledge sources to provide more accurate and context-aware answers. I build RAG systems using Qdrant, Pinecone, Cohere embeddings, and LangChain.
My primary technologies are Python, FastAPI, Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, OpenAI Agents SDK, LangGraph, n8n, Kafka, and Dapr. I select the right tools based on project requirements.

I'm a self-taught AI engineer from Pakistan. I've built production-ready AI systems including multi-agent platforms, RAG applications, full-stack SaaS products, and enterprise automation tools. My portfolio includes MediBridge (healthcare), RAG Book Platform (education), and Personal AI Employee (autonomous agents).

q: Can you work on freelance projects?
a: Yes. I'm available for freelance projects, consulting, and full-time remote roles. My focus areas are Agentic AI, Digital FTEs, RAG applications, and full-stack AI development.

q: How much do your projects cost?
a: Basic AI solutions start under $500. Complex systems require detailed scoping. I offer free initial consultations to understand requirements before quoting.

A Multi-Agent System is a team of specialized AI agents working together. Each agent has a specific role (researcher, writer, executor) and its own tools. They hand off tasks to each other, like a human team. I build these with OpenAI Agents SDK and custom orchestration.
